name: Honey Apple Tea
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the 4 tea bags in a 2-quart pot.
2. Pour the 3 cups of boiling water over the tea bags.
3. Remove the tea bags from the pot and discard them.
4. Stir in the 1/3 cup of Sue Bee Honey until dissolved.
5. Add the 3 cups of unsweetened apple juice to the mixture.
6. Allow the mixture to simmer until hot.
7. Ladle the tea into cups.
8. Garnish each cup with lemon slices.
